site.product_summary: Free Chrome extension to learn Japanese from anime (romaji-first cards, SRS, Listening Mode) plus Manga Studio and fan-ending fan-art epilogues.
site.stack: Next.js 16 App Router on Cloudflare Workers (OpenNext); blog in posts.ts; IndexNow

strategy.current_focus: Index and rank the new fan-ending product cluster (hub + series pages + doujinshi long-tail) without touching homepage UX

hypotheses.change: New hub /fan-ending-manga with FAQ + HowTo JSON-LD; CollectionPage on /end
hypotheses.expectation: Hub indexed within 14 days; appears for 'fan ending manga' or 'choose your ending manga AI' in top 50 or AI overview citations
hypotheses.measure_via: web-search spot check | live-url fetch | search-console if available

hypotheses.change: Blog posts: fan-ending hub, One Piece, Demon Slayer, AI doujinshi; internal links from blog hub + ai-manga-maker + learn-japanese-manga
hypotheses.expectation: At least 2 of 4 posts indexed; /end crawl depth improves (GSC coverage or site:animevocab.com/end)

hypotheses.change: Per-series FAQ JSON-LD + stronger titles on /end/[id]
hypotheses.expectation: /end/one-piece and /end/demon-slayer indexed; long-tail impressions for '<series> fan ending'
